drift_note: Counts sourced from slice contracts (authoritative actual). Declared sum from consolidated index. Drift concentrated in working_contract slices (notably ASC-09 RPR); upstream V1 enumeration incomplete in some slices. Flagged for Archon visibility via Step 8 delivery handover.

future_work_entries.note: Content gap registered for P8 §10 future-work surface during Iter 3 Stage 5 Editorial Feedback; not closed at Iter 3 prose authoring.

manual_maturity_progression.format_note: Run 2 5-section structure (Manual ontology V2 entities (MaturityMapping) + SAMM/DSOMM maturity progression + SLSA build/integrity progression + Out-of-Maturity scope + Future-work register). Per §26 §4 discipline: SAMM v2.1 + DSOMM são fontes primárias; SLSA só onde fizer sentido como progressão de build/integridade; alinhamento regulatório NÃO é maturity score.

manual_rastreabilidade.format_note: run-2 5-section structure (Manual ontology V2 entities + Core-mapped + Manual-only + Out-of-AppSec + Future-work). Substrate refs surface in ES grounding column inline (`<Source>: <ref1>, <ref2>; ... ; + N more sources`). §26 methodology label per Core-mapped row (Explícito/Semântico/Parcial/Reparação/Gap/Scope boundary). Manual V2 entities indexed per chapter.

manual_threat_mitigation.format_note: Run 2 6-section structure (Manual ontology V2 entities (Threat + AntiPattern + Signal) + Threat surfaces (Manual + CAPEC primary) + AntiPattern exposure mapping + CWE references (supporting only) + V1 overlay mitigation pathway + Future-work register). Mitigation strength labelled per threat row (forte / parcial / dependente_de_outros_capitulos).
